title: Lifecycle
text:
GPU allocation is the limiting factor: larger models that require many GPUs are removed sooner if relative performance falls behind, while small or efficient models get more leniency. New-model decisions and retirement discussion happen in the same Matrix channel.

## Recent changes

<details>
  <summary>June 2026</summary>

- `glm-5` ([nvidia/GLM-5.1-NVFP4](https://huggingface.co/nvidia/GLM-5.1-NVFP4)) was changed to GLM-5.2 ([nvidia/GLM-5.2-NVFP4](https://huggingface.co/nvidia/GLM-5.2-NVFP4))
- `kimi` was changed from [moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6](https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6) to [moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code](https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code).
- `gemma` was changed from [google/gemma-4-31B-it](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-31B-it) to [google/gemma-4-31B-it-qat-w4a16-ct](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-31B-it-qat-w4a16-ct).
- `gemma-small` was changed from [google/gemma-4-E4B-it](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-E4B-it) to [google/gemma-4-12B-it-qat-w4a16-ct](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-12B-it-qat-w4a16-ct). Context size changed.

</details>

## Older changes

<details>
  <summary>May 2026</summary>

- `glm-4.7` ([zai-org/GLM-4.7-FP8](https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-4.7-FP8)) was updated to `glm-5` ([nvidia/GLM-5.1-NVFP4](https://huggingface.co/nvidia/GLM-5.1-NVFP4))
- `olmo` ([allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct)) has been removed due to lack of usage.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>April 2026</summary>
